brand.name: NURA
brand.footerCopy: NURA is a jewelry display brand shaped around deep plum, champagne light, sculptural silhouettes, and small-batch statement pieces.

hero.title: Light-cut jewels for unforgettable entrances.
hero.copy: A cinematic ecommerce display for necklaces, cuffs, crystal details, and soft champagne glow.

slides.title: Noir Fan Collar
slides.copy: Dark crystal drops and polished metal made for evening styling.

slides.title: Citrine Garden Necklace
slides.copy: Warm yellow stones against a champagne display palette.

slides.title: Rose Drape Set
slides.copy: Layered rose-toned links with a sculptural necklace silhouette.

collections.title: Midnight Shine
collections.copy: Deep crystals, antique silver tones, and pieces that hold the eye after dark.

collections.title: Garden Light
collections.copy: Fresh green, citrine, and glass stones built for bright layered styling.

collections.title: Moon Metal
collections.copy: Silver cuffs, crescent forms, and cool-toned pieces with a polished edge.

atelier.title: Build a display that feels like a jewel box.
atelier.copy: The site uses the NURA logo palette as its foundation: deep plum for drama, champagne for softness, rose-gold warmth for highlights, and real product photography as the main visual material.

services.title: Private Styling
services.copy: Pair necklaces, bracelets, and cuffs by mood, color, or occasion.

services.title: Gift Finish
services.copy: Every display message can be edited for seasonal drops, packaging, or promotions.

services.title: Easy Updates
services.copy: Add a product by placing an image in the folder and adding one object to products.json.
